name: @memberjunction/ai-bridge-twilio
description: MemberJunction: Twilio Realtime Bridge driver (telephony). Connects the realtime agent engine to a phone call over Twilio Programmable Voice + Media Streams — outbound dial, inbound DID routing, single-party audio in/out, DTMF send/receive, and call transfer — via an injectable telephony call SDK seam. Audio only: no video, no screen, no Meeting Controls.
author: MemberJunction.com
//optionalDependencies: twilio is an OPTIONAL PEER SDK (CLAUDE rule 8, category 2): the package never statically imports it. Production wires RealTwilioBindings over the real twilio REST client + a Media-Streams websocket through the injected ITwilioRestLike/ITwilioMediaPump surfaces, so the package builds and unit-tests with no twilio install and no network. Loaded only when the Twilio provider is configured at deployment.
